arts.ttl: Peter Crouch slaps down Jamie O'Hara after 'embarrassing' Newcastle United claim
arts.sum: Peter Crouch has suggested that the Carabao Cup 'carries more weight now' after Newcastle United joyously celebrated ending a 70-year wait to win a major domestic trophy. In fact, Peter Crouch could not have disagreed with O'Hara more after his ex-team-mate described the scenes as 'embarrassing'.

arts.ttl: Player Newcastle want to sign now officially has a release clause after relegation confirmed with 3-1 defeat
Alan Shearer makes big Newcastle United transfer claim - 'Five players out the door' - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: Alan Shearer has predicted that up to five long-serving Newcastle United players could be 'out the door' this summer. Eddie Howe admitted that Sean Longstaff's long-term future was 'unclear' just a few days ago and the midfielder is not the only player who faces an uncertain summer.

arts.ttl: Newcastle's huge stadium boost after what Man U owner Jim Ratcliffe was given
arts.sum: Chancellor Rachel Reeves, after all, has championed the Old Trafford regeneration project as 'a shining example' of the government's plans for economic growth while Manchester United co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe revealed Labour are 'enthusiastic to get going quickly'. As part of the wider regeneration of the Old Trafford area, the club have suggested the project could create 92,000 new jobs, lead to 17,000 homes being built, bring another 1.8 million visitors to the area annually and generate an additional £7.3bn per year to the UK economy.

arts.ttl: The truth about Newcastle United's Marc Guehi bid and how star could be available for free
arts.sum: And should that be the scenario, Newcastle will very much be in line to try to sign Guehi with the player keen on the move last summer. The Magpies put forward a final bid in the region of £70million for the England centre-back last summer before it was swiftly rejected by Steve Parish.

arts.ttl: Russell Martin eyed by Leicester City with four managers on list to replace Ruud van Nistelrooy
arts.sum: Leicester City are said to be fond of former Southampton boss Russell Martin as they weigh up Ruud van Nistelrooy’s future ahead of their return to the Championship. “I think it’s very important to be aligned on that with the club,” van Nistelrooy said this week on next season’s manager’s job.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Newcastle set to face competition for £25m player who Mikel Arteta once called 'exceptional'
arts.sum: TBR Football understands Bournemouth are considering a move to bring Aaron Ramsdale back to the football club, although he also remains a transfer target for...

arts.ttl: Why Marc Guehi can play against Newcastle United despite Premier League red card
arts.sum: Palace are hitting stride at the right time but they will be without club captain Guehi for their next game, a trip to Manchester City next Saturday. Marc Guehi will be available for Crystal Palace's trip to Newcastle United later this month despite his red card against Brighton on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Lloyd Kelly caught up in furious row just weeks after Newcastle United transfer
arts.sum: But the drama continued this week when Motta went public on his sacking, his relationship with his players and rapport with Giuntoli. With Giuntoli there were no arguments and I had an excellent relationship with all my players.

arts.ttl: Jason Tindall won't change as he plots ambitious Newcastle United future plans
arts.sum: Tindall said: "When you win one, you want more. Jason Tindall has spoken about the next exciting step at St James' Park after winning the Carabao Cup with Newcastle United - but insists he won't change his character.
